name: golang-github-mdlayher-netlink-dev
title: golang-github-mdlayher-netlink-dev
summary: low-level access to Linux netlink sockets (library)
description:
low-level access to Linux netlink sockets (library)
The netlink package provides low-level access to Linux netlink sockets.
.
For more information about how netlink works, check out blog series on Linux,
Netlink, and Go
(https://mdlayher.com/blog/linux-netlink-and-go-part-1-netlink/).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-mdlayher-netlink-dev because low-level access to Linux netlink sockets (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-mdlayher-netlink-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-mdlayher-netlink-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-mdlayher-netlink-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
